song.title: I Am Your Life
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) I don’t know how to follow You my Lord. How can I run this racecourse to the end? The darkness swells and covers me around; My precious faith no longer clear to me.
[V2] 2) I hear Your voice, It calls me to Yourself; I see Your hand, It draws me to Your rest; Yet mountains high keep me From drawing nigh; How can I run the journey to the end.
[v3] 3) My sorrow, Can it really touch Your heart? Does my soft prayer Move You to tenderness? Do drops of tears drop To Your inmost part? Such helplessness, it occupies my heart.
[v4] 4) Where did the promised consecration fail? What made the sweetness In my mind depart? Such joy and hope— Just precious memories, O Lord, You are within This saddened heart.
[v5] 5) O Lord, have You forsaken me fore’er, Or am I disappointed in Your lead? Surely such sorrow only feels deep pain; Can I trust You as You know what I am?
[v6] 6) So full of tears Trickling before Your face; My feeble songs, I see no smiling face. Your harshest blows, They break me to the core; Yet nail-scarred hands Are hands of love the more.
[v7] 7) Can You revive my spirit, Lord, again? Can You rekindle love so deep within? This was Your promise And Your calling true, Your inspiration And Your word of love.
[v8] 8) I cannot trust, Yet still I trust in You; I cannot cling, Yet clinging closely still; You never failed me, Not one day or year, Your faithfulness is shown in my pursuit.
[v9] 9) No faith, no word or feeling in my heart; All darkness, hardness, And reducing too; This is the pathway You ordained for me, That in my life, I only You possess.
[v10] 10) And now I know, You’re my experience; What all seemed loss, Was so to gain You more Everything gone, Now I am one with You; Where there’s no way, I see You testified.
[v11] 11) I sigh in love— I see Your hand of love; I sweetly muse— You’ve stripped me throughout life; You lead me into seeming hopelessness, Then whispering to me: “I am your life.”
song.author: Titus Chu
